notes: Defaults DOT log-day time to Eastern Time / America/New_York for MC871792 / Narta Express.
Adds a Log Time Zone setting with common U.S. time zones and custom IANA time-zone entry.
Uses the configured home-terminal time zone for Today, log-day keys, current minute, open driving rollover, HOS clocks, and Drive Mode advisory clocks.
Does not convert or rewrite existing duty-event start/end minutes; source-of-truth event times are preserved.
Shows the active log time zone on the home log list and Log Day screen.
label: v95.84 Home terminal time zone settings
